ddt:Target.Name: CVT_X95_L38_L43_PPSR
ddt:Target.Description:
Control for FK0 (CVT2) PPSR Vehicle : X95/L38/L43 M4R Software version : 6B54 (Diag On Can)
June. 2010
Authors : Cho, Lee-Hyoung leehyoung.cho@renaultsamsungM.com Kyoung, Heechul heechul.kyung@renaultsamsungM.com
PCTT/PTEO/RSTC/RSM

Data.Name: Ratio
Data.Comment: Current gear ratio (primary pulley speed/secondary pulley speed)

Data.Name: BrakeInfoStatus (CAN)
Data.Comment: Brake information status received from ABS

Data.Name: AT_TorqueControlType (CAN)
Data.Comment: Type of torque control performed to the engine

Data.Name: CrankingAuthorization_AT (CAN)
Data.Comment: Autorization by the gearbox for engine to crank

Data.Name: CruiseControlStatus_forTM (CAN)
Data.Comment: Type of cruise control running (speed limiter or cruise control)

Data.Name: ECM_TorqueRequestStatus (CAN)
Data.Comment: Type of torque request sent by gearbox to the engine

Data.Name: Line pressure solenoid current
Data.Comment: Current detected value of line pressure solenoid

Data.Name: Secondary pressure solenoid current
Data.Comment: Current detected value of secondary pressure solenoid

Data.Name: Self-learning flag
Data.Comment: Flag to known if ROM data are learnt by ATCU

Data.Name: Engine torque
Data.Comment: Actual torque delivered by the engine

Item.Text: Primary or secondary pressure sensor failure (performance)
Sensor ground or sensor power failure
Monitoring of change rate for shift ratio

Data.Name: Current Failure
Data.Comment: Indicating if the failure is always present or not

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or short circuit to ground
Open circuit or short circuit to power supply

Data.Name: Target step motor displacement
Data.Comment: Desired step motor displacement regarding initial position

Data.Name: AT_MinimumIdleSpeedRequest (CAN)
Data.Comment: Minimum requested value of engine idle speed

Data.Name: Lock-up linear solenoid current
Data.Comment: Current detected value of lock-up solenoid

Data.Name: Gear engaged (manual mode)
Data.Comment: Gear engaged (from 1 to 6) when gearbox running in manual mode

Data.Name: Command current of line pressure solenoid
Command current of lock-up linear solenoid
Command current of secondary pressure solenoid
Command status of select on/off solenoid
Command status of shift lock solenoid

Request.Name: Write date of last after-sales operation
Read date of last after-sales operation
DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: Start lock-up select on/off solenoid control
Stop lock-up select on/off solenoid control
Report current control of line pressure solenoid

DataItem.Name: Command current of line pressure solenoid

Request.Name: Report current control of secondary pressure solenoid

DataItem.Name: Command current of secondary pressure solenoid

Request.Name: Report current control of lock-up linear solenoid

DataItem.Name: Command current of lock-up linear solenoid

Request.Name: Report current control of lock-up select on/off solenoid

DataItem.Name: Command status of select on/off solenoid

Request.Name: Report current control of shift lock solenoid

DataItem.Name: Command status of shift lock solenoid

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic session selector in DDT2000 tool-Spec A

Device.Name: Sensor ground or sensor power failure
Monitoring of change rate for shift ratio
Primary or secondary pressure sensor failure (performance)
Invalid data received from ECM
Device.Mnemonic: LFail1 bit 0 / LFail2 bit 1 / LFail2 bit 2

Device.Name: Secondary pressure solenoid failure (performance)
Device.Mnemonic: LFail4 bit 6 / LFail4 bit 5 / LFail4 bit 7

Label.Text: When ignition is switched ON, put gear lever in Parking position
Reset ECU to perform self-learning deleting
Switch ignition OFF and wait at least 3 seconds
Switch ignition ON (lever always in Parking position) and wait until the flag displays "performed"
Automatic self-learning at ignition switched ON
Warning : it's not possible to check the writing of values in EEPROM
Switch ignition OFF again and wait at least 3 seconds, at next ignition ON the FK0-001 system is operational
This screen allow to ignore ABS malfunction due to run on dynamo bench with rear wheels fixed
If the screen isn't displayed in real time, you can use manual reporting request
Don't forget to initialize screen with green button then start reading

Button.Text: To ignore ABS malfunction, to get normal lock-up behavior
To come back to complete diagnostic (normal status)

Label.Text: You can stop a permanent control before its safety end (5 seconds) using stop button
Using following buttons, linear solenoids are commanded to 400mA

Send.RequestName: Report current control of lock-up linear solenoid
Report current control of line pressure solenoid
Report current control of secondary pressure solenoid

Button.Text: Start lock-up select on/off solenoid control

Send.RequestName: Start lock-up select on/off solenoid control
Report current control of lock-up select on/off solenoid
Report current control of shift lock solenoid

Button.Text: Stop lock-up select on/off solenoid control

Send.RequestName: Stop lock-up select on/off solenoid control
Report current control of shift lock solenoid
Report current control of shift lock solenoid
Report current control of shift lock solenoid
Report current control of shift lock solenoid
Report current control of shift lock solenoid
Report current control of shift lock solenoid

Display.DataName: Command current of line pressure solenoid
Display.RequestName: Report current control of line pressure solenoid

Display.DataName: Command current of secondary pressure solenoid
Display.RequestName: Report current control of secondary pressure solenoid

Display.DataName: Command current of lock-up linear solenoid
Display.RequestName: Report current control of lock-up linear solenoid

Display.DataName: Command status of select on/off solenoid
Display.RequestName: Report current control of lock-up select on/off solenoid

Display.DataName: Command status of shift lock solenoid
Display.RequestName: Report current control of shift lock solenoid
